headline: Cintas Corp (NASDAQ:CTAS) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Test with Flying Colors
summary: The Caviar Cruise stock screener identifies quality long-term investments. Cintas (CTAS) excels with 47% ROIC, 14% EBIT growth, and strong financial health, though its premium valuation is the trade-off for sustainable compound returns.
